requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 (230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug, BS 1363)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — IEC 62368-1（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头，BS 1363）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — IEC 62368-1（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭，BS 1363）

summary.en: Oman operates on a 230 V / 50 Hz mains electricity supply and uses the Type G plug standard (UK BS 1363 three-pin). Mains-powered wireless devices, IoT gateways, Wi-Fi routers, and similar equipment must be tested and comply with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements) for electrical safety. The product and its power supply must be evaluated for the 230 V / 50 Hz electrical environment. Oman follows GCC GSO standards for electrical product safety, which adopt IEC standards as their basis. Products must carry appropriate safety certification accepted by Omani authorities; Chinese domestic GB 4943.1 safety certification is not a recognised substitute in Oman.
summary.zh: 阿曼使用230 V / 50 Hz市电供电，采用G型插头标准（英国BS 1363三脚插头）。市电供电的无线设备、物联网网关、Wi-Fi路由器及类似设备的电气安全须经测试并符合IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备 — 安全要求）。产品及其电源须依据230 V / 50 Hz电气环境进行评估。阿曼遵循以IEC标准为基础的GCC GSO电气产品安全标准。产品须持有阿曼当局认可的适当安全认证；中国国内GB 4943.1安全认证在阿曼不被承认。
summary.zht: 阿曼使用230 V / 50 Hz市電供電，採用G型插頭標準（英國BS 1363三腳插頭）。市電供電的無線設備、物聯網閘道器、Wi-Fi路由器及類似設備的電氣安全須經測試並符合IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通信技術設備 — 安全要求）。產品及其電源須依據230 V / 50 Hz電氣環境進行評估。阿曼遵循以IEC標準為基礎的GCC GSO電氣產品安全標準。產品須持有阿曼當局認可的適當安全認證；中國國內GB 4943.1安全認證在阿曼不被承認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2023 (Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety)
BS 1363 (UK Type G plug and socket standard — adopted in Oman)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (based on IEC 60950-1, transitioning to IEC 62368-1). China's mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I plugs (flat two-pin and three-pin). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety under GB 4943.1 for in-scope products. Power supplies for Chinese domestic market use Type A/I sockets; the physical plug type differs from Oman's Type G requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1，向IEC 62368-1过渡）执行。中国市电为220 V / 50 Hz，使用A/I型插头（扁两脚和三脚）。CCC（中国强制认证）对列入目录的产品按GB 4943.1涵盖电气安全。中国国内市场电源使用A/I型插座；物理插头类型与阿曼G型要求不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1，向IEC 62368-1過渡）執行。中國市電為220 V / 50 Hz，使用A/I型插頭（扁兩腳和三腳）。CCC（中國強制認證）對列入目錄的產品按GB 4943.1涵蓋電氣安全。中國國內市場電源使用A/I型插座；物理插頭類型與阿曼G型要求不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment electrical safety — China, IEC 60950-1 / 62368-1 based)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope electrical products
China mains: 220 V / 50 Hz, Type A/I plug

gap.en: Chinese products are certified to GB 4943.1 at 220 V and use Type A/I plugs, while Oman requires 230 V / 50 Hz compliance and Type G (BS 1363) plugs. Power supplies must be rated for 230 V operation and the plug type must be changed or an appropriate adapter solution considered. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not recognised in Oman; a new IEC 62368-1 evaluation accepted by Omani authorities is required. The voltage difference (220 V vs 230 V) is within IEC tolerance for many devices, but must be formally verified in the electrical safety test report.
gap.zh: 中国产品按220 V依据GB 4943.1进行认证，使用A/I型插头；而阿曼要求符合230 V / 50 Hz并使用G型（BS 1363）插头。电源须额定适用于230 V运行，插头类型须更换或考虑适当的转接方案。CCC对GB 4943.1的认证在阿曼不被承认；须进行阿曼当局接受的新的IEC 62368-1评估。电压差异（220 V对230 V）对许多设备在IEC容差范围内，但须在电气安全测试报告中正式核验。
gap.zht: 中國產品按220 V依據GB 4943.1進行認證，使用A/I型插頭；而阿曼要求符合230 V / 50 Hz並使用G型（BS 1363）插頭。電源須額定適用於230 V運行，插頭類型須更換或考慮適當的轉接方案。CCC對GB 4943.1的認證在阿曼不被承認；須進行阿曼當局接受的新的IEC 62368-1評估。電壓差異（220 V對230 V）對許多設備在IEC容差範圍內，但須在電氣安全測試報告中正式核驗。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mains-powered wireless devices sold in Oman must comply with IEC 62368-1 for the 230 V / 50 Hz electrical environment and use Type G (BS 1363) plugs. Chinese CCC (GB 4943.1 at 220 V, Type A/I plug) is not accepted. A new IEC 62368-1 electrical safety evaluation is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿曼销售的市电供电无线设备须符合230 V / 50 Hz电气环境下的IEC 62368-1，并使用G型（BS 1363）插头。中国CCC（220 V下的GB 4943.1，A/I型插头）不被接受。须进行新的IEC 62368-1电气安全评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿曼銷售的市電供電無線設備須符合230 V / 50 Hz電氣環境下的IEC 62368-1，並使用G型（BS 1363）插頭。中國CCC（220 V下的GB 4943.1，A/I型插頭）不被接受。須進行新的IEC 62368-1電氣安全評估。
